title: Fatty,Tender,Energizing,FlexitarianFriendly French Bun ClafoutisOnSlateTile
description: A fatty, tender, energizing dish featuring bun, double-fry-kfc elements. This flexitarian-friendly clafoutis is prepared in a slate tile vessel.

ingredients.name: Double-fry-kfc elements
ingredients.notes: Ensure these are double-fried to perfection.

ingredients.name: Energizing ingredients (e.g. fruit or nuts)
ingredients.notes: Choose items that complement the bun and enhance energy levels.

instructions: Preheat your slate tile oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Prepare the buns by lightly coating them in olive oil and baking powder. Place them on a hot slate tile for about 3 minutes each side until golden brown and slightly crisp.
Carefully place the double-fry-kfc elements on top of the baked buns, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
Mix together your chosen energizing ingredients with honey, lemon juice, vanilla extract to create a sweet-tangy glaze. Brush this mixture over the bun elements for extra flavor and texture.
Bake in the slate tile oven at 200 degrees Celsius for about 15 minutes or until the clafoutis is bubbly and golden.
Serve immediately with a side of fresh berries for added color and nutrition.
